creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 203406
Patch to add feature

If an option only has QMAKE_ON or QMAKE_OFF settings, it is flagged as no effect, e.g. in audio/fmit:

```
WARN: Makefile: OSS is listed in OPTIONS_DEFINE, but no PORT_OPTIONS:MOSS appears.
```

The attached patch adds QMAKE_ON and QMAKE_OFF to the list of known options helpers.
